what: Generate Presentation Images Using Google Gemini
title: Generate Presentation Images Using Google Gemini
text: bananarama generates presentation images using Google Gemini. Define images YAML configuration file support reference images style defaults. Using gemini generate slide images usually means tedious loop copying prompts web UI, downloading images, tweaking, repeating. bananarama makes process reproducible: prompts live version-controlled YAML, regenerating every image single function call. copy-paste, losing track prompt produced image. also generates images parallel, making wicked fast generate full deck images.

title: Generate Presentation Images Using Google Gemini
text: can install development version bananarama GitHub:

title: Generate Presentation Images Using Google Gemini
text: Create bananarama.yaml file describes images want generate: Reference images like [hadley] matched image files (e.g. hadley.png) directory YAML file. generate images : Images already exist skipped unless pass force = TRUE.
code: defaults:   style: >     Flat vector editorial illustration with a muted, desaturated     color palette. Mid-century modern aesthetic. Calm and approachable.   aspect-ratio: 16:9  images:   - name: robot-factory     description: >       Draw a picture of [hadley] overseeing a factory full of robots.       The robots should be typing at computers. bananarama::bananarama("path/to/bananarama.yaml")

title: Generate Presentation Images Using Google Gemini
text: style: Style prompt appended every image description. Use ensure consistent style across slides. description: Default description; usually needed unless want experiment styles. aspect-ratio: One "1:1", "3:2", "16:9", etc. Default: "16:9". resolution: One "1K", "2K", "4K". Default: "1K". n: Number variants generate per image. Default: 1. model: Gemini model use. Default: "gemini-3.1-flash-image-preview" (aka nano banana2).

title: Generate Presentation Images Using Google Gemini
text: Output directory generated images, relative YAML file. Defaults directory name YAML file (e.g. bananarama.yaml outputs bananarama/).

title: Generate Presentation Images Using Google Gemini
text: image : name (required): Used output filename ({name}.png). description (required, unless default set): Prompt image generation. Use [name] reference images directory. n: Number variants generate. Output files named {name}-1.png, {name}-2.png, etc. Default: 1. style, aspect-ratio, resolution, model: Per-image overrides defaults.

what: Generate presentation images from a YAML configuration — bananarama
title: Generate presentation images from a YAML configuration — bananarama
Generate presentation images from a YAML configuration — bananarama
Generate presentation images from a YAML configuration — bananarama
text: path Path YAML configuration file directory containing bananarama.yaml. Defaults "bananarama.yaml" current directory. output_dir Directory save generated images, relative YAML configuration file (absolute path). Defaults output-dir field YAML file, directory name YAML file (e.g. bananarama.yaml outputs bananarama/). force TRUE, regenerate images even already exist.

title: Generate presentation images from a YAML configuration — bananarama
text: Invisibly returns character vector output file paths.
